LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO MAY-16-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED AND OF NONAPPEARANCE; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. TO DEEM ADMITTED THE TRUTH OF ANY MATTERS SPECIFIED IN ITS REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE, IS GRANTED (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING). COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING, WITH A COVER LETTER DEMONSTRATING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO AUG-15-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AND OF NONAPPEARANCE; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN WELLS FARGO'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION CONCLUSIVELY ESTABLISH WELLS FARGO'S ENTITLEMENT TO JUDGMENT ON THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'s motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. The matters specified in Wells Fargo's requests for admission conclusively establish Wells Fargo's entitlement to judgment on the breach of contract cause of action alleged in the complaint.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Set For Trial On Oct-13-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion by plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A. to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in its Requests for Admission, Set One, is granted. Defendant Daniel McBride failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (CCP 2033.280(a).) The truth of any matters specified in the RFAs, Set One, is deemed admitted by McBride. (CCP 2033.280(b), (c).)

Defendants do not seek sanctions, but CCP 2033.280(c) provides they are mandatory in this instance. The court orders McBride to $50 sanctions to Wells Fargo within 15 days of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling, with a cover letter demonstrating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
